text:
  - id: ofj6
    sections: ["7"]
---
To allocate an array, one specifies a `[]` for each element.
This has two consequences:
(1) The type of an array of three `int` elements is `int[][][]`.
(2) To allocate such an array one writes `new int [5][6][7]`.

frontmatter.shortDescription: The number of brackets in an array type or an array initializer corresponds to the length of the array
frontmatter.shortCorrection: The number of brackets in an array type or an array initializer corresponds to the rank of the array
